pillars.title: The
pillars.subtitle: LinkYourArt unites the major actors of the creative economy and the public in a single, secure, and transparent ecosystem.

creators.title: Creators
creators.desc: The heartbeat of the ecosystem. Creators tokenize their vision into Indexed Creative Contracts, offering future revenue shares to fuel their growth while maintaining creative control.

investors.title: Investors
investors.desc: Back the next generation of masterpieces. Investors acquire LYA Units representing future revenue shares, participating in the success of verified creative projects.

professionals.title: Professionals
professionals.desc: The validators of excellence. Industry leaders, Labels, and Producers rate projects, ensuring the LYA Score reflects real-market potential and expert quality.

public.title: The Public
public.desc: Discover the projects of tomorrow. The general public can explore the registry, track the creative journey, and contribute to the growth of masterpieces they believe in.

standard.title: The LYA
standard.desc: LinkYourArt introduces the unique rating index for the creative market. Each LYA Unit represents a standardized $50 value of future revenue potential. This peer-to-peer system allows for the exchange of revenue shares based on project advancement and milestones, providing the only objective measure of creative value.

p1.title: Creator Base Price
p1.desc: The initial valuation set by the creator at project inception.

p2.title: LYA Algorithm Index
p2.desc: Real-time data analysis across 5 critical pillars of project health.

p3.title: Professional Validation
p3.desc: Expert ratings from industry leaders (Netflix, Amazon, Producers).

scoring.title: The LYA
scoring.subtitle: Our proprietary algorithm evaluates every contract across 5 critical notation criteria, providing a transparent and objective System Yield Index out of 1000.

c1.label: Project Quality
c1.desc: Evaluation of artistic merit, historical significance, and creative execution.

c2.label: Marketability
c2.desc: Analysis of secondary market demand, liquidity potential, and audience reach.

c3.label: Legal Security
c3.desc: Verification of contractual rights, IP protection, and regulatory compliance.

c4.label: Technical Innovation
c4.desc: Assessment of technological uniqueness, smart contract complexity, and digital durability.

c5.label: Growth Potential
c5.desc: Projections of future value appreciation based on market trends and roadmap.

cta.title: Start
cta.desc: Join the professional creative registry and start trading contract units today.

quotes.scoring: The LYA Score represents the definitive index of a creative contract's living value, updated in real-time through market feedback and periodic professional audits.

footer.disclaimer: LinkYourArt Protocol operates as a technological layer for contractual valuation. Not a financial service.
